items_all.title: Paris-based Tsuga, whose observability software runs in customers' own clouds to help them skip per-byte ingestion costs, raised a $35M Series A led by Singular (Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web)
items_all.title_original: Paris-based Tsuga, whose observability software runs in customers' own clouds to help them skip per-byte ingestion costs, raised a $35M Series A led by Singular (Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web)
items_all.title_en: Paris-based Tsuga, whose observability software runs in customers' own clouds to help them skip per-byte ingestion costs, raised a $35M Series A led by Singular (Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web)
items_all.title_zh: 總部位於巴黎的 Tsuga 的可觀測性軟體在客戶自己的雲端中運行，以幫助他們跳過每個位元組的攝取成本，並籌集了由 Singular 領投的 3500 萬美元 A 輪融資（Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web）

items_all.title_en: NAND flash maker Kioxia, Japan's most valuable company since June 12, plans to offer US depositary shares in spring 2027 amid AI-driven demand for memory chips (Bloomberg)
items_all.title_zh: NAND 快閃記憶體製造商 Kioxia 是自 6 月 12 日以來日本市值最高的公司，由於人工智慧驅動的記憶體晶片需求，該公司計劃於 2027 年春季發行美國存託股票（彭博）

items_all.title: Amazon plans to expand Amazon Now to 300+ Indian cities and towns, up from 100 at present, as CEO Andy Jassy visits India; a source says he is set to meet Modi (Sankalp Phartiyal/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_original: Amazon plans to expand Amazon Now to 300+ Indian cities and towns, up from 100 at present, as CEO Andy Jassy visits India; a source says he is set to meet Modi (Sankalp Phartiyal/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_en: Amazon plans to expand Amazon Now to 300+ Indian cities and towns, up from 100 at present, as CEO Andy Jassy visits India; a source says he is set to meet Modi (Sankalp Phartiyal/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_zh: 隨著執行長 Andy Jassy 訪問印度，亞馬遜計劃將 Amazon Now 擴展到 300 多個印度城鎮，目前數量為 100 個；消息人士稱他將與莫迪會面（Sankalp Phartiyal/彭博社）

items_all.title: Qualcomm says it will acquire Modular, which builds a chip software platform and has a proprietary coding language, in a nearly $4B deal set to close in H2 2026 (Lauren Goode/Wired)
items_all.title_original: Qualcomm says it will acquire Modular, which builds a chip software platform and has a proprietary coding language, in a nearly $4B deal set to close in H2 2026 (Lauren Goode/Wired)
items_all.title_en: Qualcomm says it will acquire Modular, which builds a chip software platform and has a proprietary coding language, in a nearly $4B deal set to close in H2 2026 (Lauren Goode/Wired)
items_all.title_zh: 高通表示，它將以近 40 億美元的交易收購 Modular，後者構建了一個晶片軟體平台並擁有專有的編碼語言，交易將於 2026 年下半年完成（Lauren Goode/Wired）
items_all.title_bilingual: 高通表示，它將以近 40 億美元的交易收購 Modular，後者構建了一個晶片軟體平台並擁有專有的編碼語言，交易將於 2026 年下半年完成（Lauren Goode/Wired） / Qualcomm says it will acquire Modular, which builds a chip software platform and has a proprietary coding language, in a nearly $4B deal set to close in H2 2026 (Lauren Goode/Wired)

items_all_raw.title_zh: NAND 快閃記憶體製造商 Kioxia 是自 6 月 12 日以來日本市值最高的公司，由於人工智慧驅動的記憶體晶片需求，該公司計劃於 2027 年春季發行美國存託股票（彭博）
